Hero.title: Agile B Darija:
Hero.slogan: Agility as a Way of Life
Hero.description: The Moroccan hub for Agile practitioners, students, and leaders to collaborate, learn, and grow.

Features.description: Empowering the Moroccan Agile community through collaboration, education, and real-world impact.

culture.title: Community Culture
culture.desc: A vibrant space where Agile enthusiasts connect, share experiences, and build lasting relationships.

practice.title: Practice & Experimentation
practice.desc: Hands-on workshops, sprints, and real-world projects to sharpen your Agile skills through practice.

impact.title: Social Impact
impact.desc: Leveraging Agile methodologies for social good through associative projects and community initiatives.

network.title: Professional Network
network.desc: Connect with industry leaders, find mentors, and discover career opportunities in the Agile ecosystem.

Formations.title: Our Formations
Formations.description: Choose the formation that suits you and start your learning journey with us.

agile-darija.title: Agile B Darija
agile-darija.desc: Learn Agile and Scrum in Moroccan Darija. Understand how teams work with speed and efficiency.

mindset.title: Mindset & Soft Skills
mindset.desc: Develop your personality and mindset to benefit your professional life. Communication, leadership, and time management.

teamwork.title: Agile Teamwork
teamwork.desc: Learn how to work with your team successfully. Workshops and practical exercises to understand team dynamics.

design-thinking.title: Design Thinking
design-thinking.desc: Problem-solving skills in a creative way. Learn how to think like a designer to find innovative solutions.

Team.title: Our Experts
Team.description: Meet the passionate experts driving the Agile B Darija community forward.

Roadmap.title: Our Journey
Roadmap.description: Follow our path — from where we started to where we're headed next.

Community.title: Community Love
Community.description: Hear from members of the Agile B Darija community.
